message:
fix(ui): fresh eyes review - clipboard fallback, touch targets, safe areas

BasketSidebar:
- Add iOS Safari clipboard fallback (textarea/execCommand method)
- Add error logging for clipboard failures
- Make close button touch-friendly (h-11 w-11)

SwipeablePromptCard:
- Use CSS max() with safe-area-inset-bottom for quick actions menu
- Ensures proper spacing on iPhones with home indicator

BottomSheet:
- Use explicit bg-white/dark:bg-neutral-950 instead of bg-card
- Consistent with BasketSidebar for CSS variable reliability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
